books.title: The Lost World
books.author: Arthur Conan Doyle
books.summary: A team of scientists and adventurers explores a prehistoric land.

books.title: The Mucker
books.author: Edgar Rice Burroughs
books.summary: A street tough undergoes a transformation as he navigates the dangerous worlds of Chicago’s slums, a South Pacific island, and the wilds of Mexico.

books.title: Father Henson’s Story of His Own Life
books.author: Josiah Henson
books.summary: Josiah Henson’s autobiography recounts his life in slavery and his escape to freedom in Canada.

books.title: Queen Victoria
books.author: Lytton Strachey
books.summary: A sardonic and generally unflattering biography of Victoria Alexandrina, Queen of England.

books.title: Anne of Green Gables
books.author: L. M. Montgomery
books.summary: A coming-of-age story of a young girl growing up on a farm on Prince Edward Island.

books.title: The Conscious Lovers
books.author: Richard Steele
books.summary: A rich young man tries to avoid the marriage his father has arranged.

books.title: Back to Methuselah
books.author: George Bernard Shaw
books.summary: Five linked plays explore human longevity and governance.

books.title: The Lost World
books.author: Arthur Conan Doyle
books.summary: A team of scientists and adventurers explores a prehistoric land.

books.title: The Brooklyn Murders
books.author: G. D. H. Cole
books.summary: Scotland Yard and a pair of amateur sleuths investigate the case of two heirs to a fortune who apparently murdered each other.

books.title: The Beetle
books.author: Richard Marsh
books.summary: A group of middle-class Victorians find themselves pitted against an ancient Egyptian evil.

books.title: Running a Thousand Miles for Freedom
books.author: William Craft
books.summary: The authors escape from slavery by posing as a slaveowner and his slave.

books.title: The Mystery of a Hansom Cab
books.author: Fergus Hume
books.summary: A man is found dead in a hansom cab in the city of Melbourne, Australia, and a young man is accused of his murder.

books.title: A Vindication of the Rights of Woman
books.author: Mary Wollstonecraft
books.summary: Wollstonecraft argues for equal treatment of women in society, especially in matters of education.

books.title: The Story of My Experiments with Truth
books.author: Mahatma Gandhi
books.summary: Gandhi relates his life experiences from his birth in Gujarat in 1869 through the Indian National Congress of 1915.

books.title: Don Juan
books.author: Lord Byron
books.summary: A Spanish libertine becomes an unwitting seducer through a series of adventurous escapades.

books.title: Candide
books.author: Voltaire
books.summary: A witty satire that tells of the young Candide’s attempts to stay optimistic through a series of incredible hardships.

books.title: Black No More
books.author: George Schuyler
books.summary: A medical process that makes black people look white revolutionizes American society.

books.title: Household Tales
books.author: Jacob Grimm
books.summary: A collection of Germanic fairy tales containing the classic stories of Cinderella, Snow-White, Rapunzel, and other well known characters.

books.title: Religion and the Rise of Capitalism
books.author: R. H. Tawney
books.summary: A tracing of the development of religious thought from the Middle Ages to the dawn of the Industrial Revolution.

books.title: The Path to Rome
books.author: Hilaire Belloc
books.summary: Hilaire Belloc takes a walking pilgrimage to Rome from his hometown in France, writing of the journey, sketching the sights, and digressing on a wide variety of subjects.
